FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f6a9d853b00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-05T12:42:21Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-05T12:40:42Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-05T12:42:21Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-05T12:40:42Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/05 12:44:05.575696830 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/05 12:44:05.575719483 {

2026/05/05 12:44:05.575849408 new$version <- version
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575870767 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575872080 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575912976 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575914328 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575930489 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575931480 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575944585 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575945457 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575958321 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575961176 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575982953 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.575984366 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576004925 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576005546 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576014562 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576014983 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576023910 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/05 12:44:05.576033197 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576033618 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576042424 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576042835 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576051271 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576051812 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576080235 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576081377 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576098629 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576099531 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576112234 "default"))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576112675 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576120710 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576121131 }
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576133694 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576134656 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576155595 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576156146 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/05 12:44:05.576165253 }
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576174670 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576175091 }
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576182976 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576183397 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576200349 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576205338 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576222710 domain = NA)
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576223632 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576237568 }
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576238109 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576246544 old$family <- family
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576247065 }
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576254579 version <- old$version

2026/05/05 12:44:05.576272323 else stop("invalid PDF version")

2026/05/05 12:44:05.576313429 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576313840 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576344166 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576345238 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576368534 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/05 12:44:05.576371009 invisible()
